productDisplayName: Lino Perros Men Leather Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from leather, this brown wallet from lino perros is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed man. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Dimensions: 9 cm x 11 cm Has two main compartments Two card slots on the left side An id card pocket on the left side with two card holder slots at the back Two insert pockets on either side One buttoned pocket on the right side Brand name embossed on the top Care Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
